0.title: Smart Scheduling
0.desc: Schedule appointments by barber, avoid conflicts, and send reminders.

1.title: Clients
1.desc: History, preferences, and loyalty in one place.

2.title: Sales (POS)
2.desc: Charge for services and products at the counter.

4.title: Reports
4.desc: Sales, appointments, and performance by barber or location.

5.title: Multi-Location
5.desc: Manage multiple locations from a central dashboard.

6.title: Barbers
6.desc: Team onboarding, roles, and individual schedules.

7.title: WhatsApp
7.desc: Reminders and direct communication with your clients.

0.title: Create your barbershop
0.desc: Sign up in minutes and set up your business.

1.title: Set up services
1.desc: Add barbers, services, and business hours.

2.title: Start growing
2.desc: Manage appointments, sales, and clients from one place.

0.quote: Since I started using BarberShow, my appointments are organized and clients arrive on time. Amazing.
0.name: Juan Pérez

1.quote: The integrated POS saves me hours. I sell products and services without leaving the app.
1.name: Carlos Méndez

2.quote: With 3 barbers and 2 locations, I needed something robust. BarberShow delivers and exceeds expectations.
2.name: Miguel Torres

hero.description: Schedule appointments, manage clients, process sales, manage your team, and grow your business from a single platform.
hero.notBarber: Not a barber? Browse registered barbershops and book your appointment online.

clients.description: Browse barbershops registered on BarberShow and book your appointment online. Fast, easy, and in just a few steps.

0.title: Choose a barbershop
0.desc: Browse barbershops affiliated with our platform.

1.title: Select service and time
1.desc: Choose barber, date, and time based on availability.

2.title: Confirm your appointment
2.desc: Get instant confirmation — just name and phone number.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to grow your business
featuresSection.subtitle: Tools designed specifically for modern barbershops.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that best fits your barbershop
pricing.subtitle: No contracts, cancel anytime.

cta.title: Ready to take your barbershop to the next level?
cta.subtitle: Thousands of barbers already run their business with BarberShow.

footer.description: The all-in-one platform to run your barbershop like a professional.
footer.loginLink: I already have an account — Sign in

contact.waMessage: Hello, I have a question about BarberShow.

gratuito.label: Free Plan
gratuito.description: View and manage appointments only. Up to 100 appointments per month.
gratuito.benefit0: Appointment scheduling only: view booked appointments
gratuito.benefit2: No POS sales, clients, reports, or inventory
gratuito.benefit3: Ideal for trying the app or very small businesses

solo.label: Solo Plan
solo.benefit0: Simple interface: everything is "my business", no locations or barber list
solo.benefit1: Reduced menu: Dashboard, Appointments, Clients, Sales (POS), basic Settings
solo.benefit2: Direct appointments and sales: no barber selection; the appointment or sale is with you
solo.benefit3: Basic reports: sales and appointment summary
solo.benefit5: Ideal for: independent barbers working alone

barberia.label: Barbershop Plan
barberia.benefit1: Multiple barbers: add and remove barbers; assign appointments and sales by barber
barberia.benefit2: Schedule by barber: view and manage each professional's calendar
barberia.benefit3: Reports by barber: view performance and sales for each one
barberia.benefit4: One location: single shop; barber selector, not location selector
barberia.benefit5: Team control: manage who does what (appointments, sales)
barberia.benefit6: Optional: inventory, finance, WhatsApp Console, user administration
barberia.benefit7: Ideal for: barbershops with 2–4 barbers in a single location

multisede.label: Multi-Location Plan
multisede.benefit1: Multiple locations: create and manage several shops
multisede.benefit2: Location selector: switch locations to view schedules, barbers, and reports
multisede.benefit3: Reports by location: compare performance across locations
multisede.benefit4: Global administration: centralized view; control per location
multisede.benefit5: No limit on locations or barbers: scalable for chains
multisede.benefit6: Ideal for: chains or businesses with multiple barbershops

reportsPage.title: Reports and Statistics
reportsPage.printShareBody:
BarberShow Report – {date}
Period sales, appointment status, top products. (Open in browser to print full report.)
reportsPage.noLocationHint: Select a location in the top menu to view sales, appointments, and reports for that shop.
reportsPage.noSalesTrendLocation: Select a location to view the sales trend.
reportsPage.noSalesTrendData: No sales in the period to display.
reportsPage.noProductSales: No product sales in the period.

salesRecords.title: Service records
salesRecords.subtitle: Completed sales by date
salesRecords.emptyTitle: No records in the selected range
salesRecords.emptyHint: Adjust the dates or wait for new sales

userAdmin.title: User and Privileges Administration
userAdmin.transferHintTitle: Transfer a barber to another barbershop:
userAdmin.transferHintBody: Edit user → change Barbería / Access location → choose Barber profile at that location → Save.
userAdmin.transferHintNote: If there is no profile at the new location, create one in Settings → Barbers.
userAdmin.passwordRequired: When creating a new user you must assign a password.
userAdmin.noBarbersInLocation: No barbers at this location. Go to Settings (menu) → Barbers tab → New Barber and create the profile (name and specialty). Then return here and select it.
userAdmin.barberProfileHint: This way they will only see their appointments and sales, not other barbers'.

whatsapp.myClientsOnly: My scheduled clients (appointments with me only)
whatsapp.staffListTitle: My scheduled clients – Send from your WhatsApp
whatsapp.adminListTitle: Day appointments – Send from your WhatsApp
whatsapp.noAppointmentsStaff: You have no appointments scheduled for the selected day.
whatsapp.noAppointmentsAdmin: No appointments for the selected day.
whatsapp.reminderMessage: Hi {name}, reminder: you have an appointment on {date} at {time} at {shop}. See you soon!

deactivate.title: Permanently delete your account?
deactivate.step1Subtitle: Tell us why you're leaving. Your feedback helps us improve.
deactivate.step2Subtitle: Review the details and confirm with your password to continue.
deactivate.sorryTitle: We're sorry to see you go. Your feedback helps us improve.
deactivate.acknowledge: I understand that my access data will be permanently and irreversibly deleted.
deactivate.successMessage: Your account has been permanently deleted.

reasons.hardToUse: The app is hard to use

onboarding.title: How do you work?
onboarding.subtitleDefault: Choose the option that best describes your business.
onboarding.subtitleNamed: Set up "{name}" according to your business type.
onboarding.soloDesc: One person, one location. Simplified menu and basic reports.
onboarding.teamDesc: Several barbers at one location. Schedule and reports by barber.
onboarding.chainDesc: Multiple locations. Global administration and reports by location.
